rationale: Portugal is most affected indirectly — a US-Iran deal could ease energy prices, while US NATO asset cuts have limited immediate impact on Portugal's western periphery position.

top_events.title: Iran says deal to end fighting with US has 'never been closer'
top_events.summary: A US-Iran agreement could lower global oil and gas prices, providing indirect relief to Portugal's energy-sensitive cost of living and tourism-dependent economy.

top_events.title: US to cut air and naval assets deployed for NATO operations in Europe
top_events.summary: US reducing NATO Europe assets is a geopolitical shift, but Portugal's western Atlantic position means the immediate security impact is lower than for eastern flank members.

top_events.title: SpaceX IPO debuts in US markets, Musk becomes world's first trillionaire
top_events.summary: A major market event with global financial ripple effects; indirect impact on EU investment sentiment and Portuguese pension/savings funds is modest but present.
